subject: coworkers iOS app GTM: define launch plan and target ICP

pass_if: named primary ICP and top 2 acquisition channels documented
App Store listing copy + screenshots checklist drafted
launch sequence with TestFlight beta gate and GA date defined

subject: Pricing & packaging: define tiers, price points, and free-to-paid path

pass_if: 3 named tiers with monthly price points and feature gates
free-to-paid conversion trigger defined
competitor price comparison table with 3+ comparables

subject: 3-subdomain product surface: map subdomains to jobs-to-be-done and entry points

pass_if: each of 3 subdomains mapped to a primary user job and CTA
cross-surface navigation/handoff flow documented
one north-star metric per subdomain defined

subject: Author product-manager SKILL.md wiring 9 PM plugin skills

pass_if: agents/product-manager/SKILL.md exists with manager-tier identity (product-manager@subagentknowledge.com)
all 9 plugin skills referenced: competitive-brief, metrics-review, priority-rerank, product-brainstorming, roadmap-update, sprint-planning, stakeholder-update, synthesize-research, write-spec
Sources section cites cowork/skills/plugins/product-management:* and agents.ts
fail_if: coworker/subagent tier identity instead of manager

subject: Register product capability surface in e2m registry/README

pass_if: product-manager already in agents.ts (FUNCTIONS includes product) — confirm derivation product-manager@subagentknowledge.com
e2m-mcp/README.md or agents/product-manager/SKILL.md documents the 9-skill product capability surface
dispatch one roadmap-update test envelope manager->coworker
product-coworker writes an ack/result transition
round-trip completes within one session
apps/claude-cowork-linux/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json exists (Ubuntu 22.04 / node 18, references the Nix-tested path)
apps/claude-cowork-linux/.devcontainer/mcp-docker-profile.json defines MCP_DOCKER profile 'cowork' with 7 connectors: GitHub, Cloudflare, Atlassian/Jira, Stripe, Redis, Box/Drive, Brave
workspace mounted at /workspace; profile activated via mcp-create-profile / mcp-add
apps/claude-cowork-linux/.devcontainer/Dockerfile builds; deps mirror flake.nix devShell (node18, electron, asar, p7zip, bubblewrap, zstd, dbus)
post-create.sh repacks app.asar from stubs (@ant/claude-swift, @ant/claude-native) and activates the cowork MCP profile
reuses apps/claude-cowork-linux/stubs/; OAuth-only preserved (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY never set in image or profile)
docker build exits 0 in < 5 min; Cowork (Electron) launches with /sessions path translation
MCP 'cowork' profile lists all 7 connectors; validate.sh exits 0
apps/claude-cowork-linux/.devcontainer/README.md documents setup + the OAuth-only invariant
